title: gymnadenia mitostigma
intro: Gymnadenia mitostigma, also known as the autumn lady's-tresses, is a type of orchid that belongs to the genus Gymnadenia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Gymnadenia mitostigma include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it useful in treating infections and wounds. Herbal preparations of Gymnadenia mitostigma are typically made by infusing the plant's roots or leaves in water or alcohol, which can be consumed as a tea or taken as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
